3D Characters

Don't Look Down Main Character

Character modeled , uv unwrapped, painted and implimented into Unity3D.

Made in Blender, Substance Painter, and 3D Coat - one 2k texture map

Created as the main character for my University Senior Project game called "Don't Look Down"

Don't Look Down Beetle

Beetle modeled , rigged, animated and implimented into Unity3D.

Made in Blender

Created to fill the enviorment and be a "potential handhold" for my University Senior Project game called "Don't Look Down"

Mushroom Character

Guillotine made as part of a school project.

Female Character

A sculpted and retopologized character made in Zbrush, Blender, and Adobe Substance Painter.
